top_signals.title: Brexit 10 years later: How the UK economy and politics changed, in charts
top_signals.summary: Ten years after the Brexit vote, CNBC compiled these charts show how the U.K. has changed across growth, immigration, sterling, trade and politics.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
